mechanism_narrative: Declines in the federal funds rate reduce corporate borrowing costs and lower equity discount rates, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A sustained increase in the unemployment rate signals deteriorating labor market conditions and impending economic contraction, driving negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in >60% of triggered instances despite rising unemployment.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous expansion in retail sales and housing starts confirms broad-based consumer demand strength, which translates into higher corporate earnings and positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Joint positive deviations in RSAFS and HOUST fail to predict positive 60d returns with a t-statistic above 1.5.

mechanism_narrative: Month-over-month increases in the index of industrial production reflect accelerating manufacturing output and supply-side capacity utilization, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: Positive INDPRO growth coincides with negative 5d SPX returns in >55% of observations during early-cycle phases.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating consumer price inflation triggers expectations of aggressive monetary tightening, which compresses equity valuations and produces negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: CPIAUCSL spikes above the threshold consistently precede positive 20d SPX returns with a win rate exceeding 65%.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent growth in total nonfarm payrolls and a declining unemployment rate confirm robust labor market expansion, supporting consumer spending and generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: The combined PAYEMS and UNRATE signal yields a Rank IC below 0.01 across all tested rolling windows.

mechanism_narrative: Quarter-over-quarter growth in real gross domestic product indicates expanding economic output and corporate revenue potential, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Positive GDPC1 growth fails to predict positive 60d SPX returns with statistical significance (p > 0.10) in out-of-sample testing.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp month-over-month contraction in industrial production signals immediate supply-side disruption and weakening economic activity, triggering negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: INDPRO declines exceeding the threshold are followed by positive 5d SPX returns in >60% of cases.
